title: At G7 summit, Rubio tries to deny the US is bogged down in Iran
subhed: On Friday, the US Secretary of State told G7 foreign ministers that the war in the Middle East would not drag on. Tehran, meanwhile, continues its strikes: Twelve American soldiers were wounded in a drone attack in Saudi Arabia that evening.

title: Pope denounces widening gap between the rich and poor during visit to Monaco
Revealed: Satellite image shows mysterious cargo at Iranian nuclear site in 2025
Zelensky says Ukraine and UAE 'agreed to cooperate' on defense
subhed: The Ukrainian president's unannounced visit to the UAE comes a day after he announced a defense agreement with Saudi Arabia, inked as the Gulf countries face Iranian drones launched by Tehran in retaliation for US-Israeli strikes.

title: EU is targeting small parcels from Shein, Temu and other Chinese e-commerce sites
subhed: Non-European platforms will now be legally responsible for products entering the European Union and will be taxed starting in July.

title: Matisse, the carver of light, at the Grand Palais in Paris
subhed: The delightful exhibition showcases later work by the artist who never stopped experimenting and features his famous cut-outs as well as monumental canvases.

title: Volodymyr Zelensky's exclusive interview with Le Monde on the war in Ukraine
subhed: In an interview with Le Monde, the Ukrainian president shares his perspective on a possible end to the conflict and urges the US and all allied nations to maintain their support for Ukraine.

Chair of the NATO Military Committee: 'European nations step in for the United States whenever they are drawn to another front'
In Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, 'no one ventures outside anymore apart from rescue teams'
subhed: Like 42 other rescue workers since the war began on March 2, 16-year-old Joude Souleiman was killed by an Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, the second-largest Shiite city in southern Lebanon, where only a few hundred people out of 75,000 residents remain.

title: Volodymyr Zelensky: 'The pressure on Russia is insufficient. Not only from the US, but also from Europe'
subhed: In an interview with Le Monde, the Ukrainian president expressed concern about the consequences of the war in the Middle East on the conflict between Kyiv and Moscow. Pressured by both the Americans and the Russians to give up the Donbas, he defended the region's strategic importance and warned Europeans of the urgent need to lift the Hungarian veto on the €90 billion loan approved in 2025.

title: 'Trump would benefit from rereading Obama's 2015 speech on Iran'
subhed: The US president belatedly realized that the military option carried significant risks. He did not rely on his administration's recognized experts on Iran, notes Le Monde columnist Gilles Paris.
